note: 1.14.1 hotfix digest. Hand-captured from the maintainer-provided patch notes, then applied by scripts/apply-patch.js, which stacks all patch files in order (latest trend wins per hero). Update this file and re-run the script when a new patch drops.
global: Balance hotfix targeting the biggest outliers since 1.14, plus bug fixes and stability improvements.

systems.name: Eternals
systems.summary: Several blessings rebalanced (Thraex/Ferocity, Nihil/From the Abyss, Krix/Regenerative Tissue, Lotus/Prima Donna, Demiurge major + Bio-Mechanical Fusion + Construct). Values live in data/game-data/eternals.json. Bugfix: Idrisil/Glacier now grants the correct Magical Armor.

items: World Breaker: Maya bonus-health-to-magical-power 6% -> 5% (item not yet present in items.json).
Everbloom: bugfix — Divine Protection now grants the intended amount of Tenacity.

changes: Shadow Slip magical scaling 40% -> 35% (recast 4s -> 3.5s, late cooldown raised)
Rumble max-health-to-physical-power gain reduced at ranks 2-5
Acacia true damage, Royal Flourish & Iron Rose health scaling, Imperial Lash & Queen's Garden damage all reduced
Heavy Caliber and Rally Point nerfed; Press the Advantage fire rate, base Physical Power, and K-75 scaling buffed
